arts.ttl: Stuttgart already planning for life after Hoeneß
arts.sum: SC Paderborn’s Lukas Kwasniok is on VfB Stuttgart’s wishlist to replace the sought-after Sebastian Hoeneß.

arts.ttl: Liverpool keen to acquire Stuttgart's Stiller, reports suggest
arts.sum: The Swabian's midfielder might be on his way to the red half of Merseyside if rumours are to be believed.

arts.ttl: Holstein Kiel vs Stuttgart preview: Visitors in desperate need of win
arts.sum: Two sides with contrasting ambitions go head to head up north on Saturday afternoon, with VfB Stuttgart in need of three points to get their European charge back on track.

arts.ttl: Stuttgart missing six centre backs ahead of trip to Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: Stuttgart will be without six central defenders ahead of their match against Holstein Kiel at the weekend. Both Luca Jaquez and Jeff Chabot have been added to the long list…

arts.ttl: Preview: Holstein Kiel vs. Stuttgart - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Holstein Kiel and Stuttgart, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Stuttgart, runners-up last term, have slipped to seventh after just four points in six games, stuttering in their quest to secure a Champions League spot once again. German champions way back in 1912...
